name: Complete NIXL LIBFABRIC Deployment - v6 (Phase 3 Complete Pattern)
description: 完全自動化デプロイメント。Phase 3 の成功パターンを100%再現：kv-transfer-config、NIXL環境変数、distributed-executor-backend mp を含む。task_runner.sh の1行ずつ実行モデルに対応。

tasks.name: Check libfabric-dev installation
commands: if ! dpkg -l | grep -q libfabric-dev; then echo '[ERROR] libfabric-dev is not installed. Install with: sudo apt-get install -y libfabric-dev'; exit 1; fi

tasks.name: Check local prerequisites
commands: command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] git not found'; exit 1; }
command -v ninja >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] ninja not found'; exit 1; }
command -v meson >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] meson not found'; exit 1; }
command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[ERROR] aws CLI not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Clone NIXL from GitHub
commands: if [ -d "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/.git" ]; then cd "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git fetch origin && git checkout ${NIXL_BRANCH} && git pull origin ${NIXL_BRANCH}; else rm -rf "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git clone "${NIXL_REPO}" "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && cd "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}" && git checkout ${NIXL_BRANCH}; fi

tasks.name: Verify Request/Response protocol
commands: grep -q 'loadRemoteConnInfo' "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.h" || { echo '[ERROR] loadRemoteConnInfo not found'; exit 1; }
grep -q 'remote_conn_info' "${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.cpp" || { echo '[ERROR] remote_conn_info not found'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Verify plugin artifact
commands: file "${PLUGIN_PATH}" | grep -q 'ELF.*shared object' || { echo '[ERROR] Invalid ELF'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Upload to S3
commands: aws s3 ls "s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}" --region ${AWS_REGION} || { echo '[ERROR] Upload failed'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Check SSH connectivity
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}" 'echo "[OK] Node1"' || { echo '[ERROR] Node1 unreachable'; exit 1; }
ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}" 'echo "[OK] Node2"' || { echo '[ERROR] Node2 unreachable'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Producer: Install vLLM
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}" 'python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir "vllm==0.17.0" --user -q && python3 -c "import vllm; print(f\"[OK] vLLM {vllm.__version__}\")"'

tasks.name: Producer: Install NIXL
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}" 'python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir "nixl[cu12]" --user -q && python3 -c "import nixl; print(\"[OK] NIXL installed\")"'

tasks.name: Producer: Deploy LIBFABRIC plugin
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}" "NIXL_DIR=\$(python3 -c 'import nixl, os; print(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__))') && PLUGIN_DIR=\"\${NIXL_DIR}/_lib\" && aws s3 cp \"s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}\" \"\${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so\" --region ${AWS_REGION} --quiet && chmod 755 \"\${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so\" && ls -lh \"\${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so\""

tasks.name: Producer: Create startup script
commands:
cat > /tmp/nixl-producer-config/start.sh << 'SCRIPTEOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER

FI_LOG_LEVEL=debug \
VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_HOST=NODE1_PRIVATE_IP_PLACEHOLDER \
VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_PORT=ZMQ_PORT_PLACEHOLDER \
NIXL_LOG_LEVEL=TRACE \
VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL=DEBUG \
nohup python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model MODEL_NAME_PLACEHOLDER \
  --port PRODUCER_PORT_PLACEHOLDER \
  --tensor-parallel-size TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE_PLACEHOLDER \
  --distributed-executor-backend mp \
  --gpu-memory-utilization GPU_MEMORY_UTILIZATION_PLACEHOLDER \
  --max-model-len MAX_MODEL_LEN_PLACEHOLDER \
  --max-num-batched-tokens MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS_PLACEHOLDER \
  --kv-transfer-config "$(cat /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/kv_config.json)" \
  > /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/producer.log 2>&1 &

echo $! > /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/producer.pid
echo "[INFO] Producer started with PID: $(cat /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/producer.pid)"
SCRIPTEOF

tasks.name: Producer: Verify setup
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE1_PUBLIC_IP}" 'python3 -c "import nixl, os; d=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__),\"_lib\"); print(f\"[OK] {len([f for f in os.listdir(d) if \\\"LIBFABRIC\\\" in f])} LIBFABRIC plugin(s)\")"'

tasks.name: Consumer: Install vLLM
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}" 'python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir "vllm==0.17.0" --user -q && python3 -c "import vllm; print(f\"[OK] vLLM {vllm.__version__}\")"'

tasks.name: Consumer: Install NIXL
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}" 'python3 -m pip install --no-cache-dir "nixl[cu12]" --user -q && python3 -c "import nixl; print(\"[OK] NIXL installed\")"'

tasks.name: Consumer: Deploy LIBFABRIC plugin
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}" "NIXL_DIR=\$(python3 -c 'import nixl, os; print(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__))') && PLUGIN_DIR=\"\${NIXL_DIR}/_lib\" && aws s3 cp \"s3://${S3_BUCKET}/${S3_PLUGIN_KEY}\" \"\${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so\" --region ${AWS_REGION} --quiet && chmod 755 \"\${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so\" && ls -lh \"\${PLUGIN_DIR}/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so\""

tasks.name: Consumer: Create startup script
commands:
cat > /tmp/nixl-consumer-config/start.sh << 'SCRIPTEOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER

FI_LOG_LEVEL=debug \
VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_HOST=NODE2_PRIVATE_IP_PLACEHOLDER \
VLLM_NIXL_SIDE_CHANNEL_PORT=ZMQ_PORT_PLACEHOLDER \
NIXL_LOG_LEVEL=TRACE \
VLLM_LOGGING_LEVEL=DEBUG \
nohup python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model MODEL_NAME_PLACEHOLDER \
  --port CONSUMER_PORT_PLACEHOLDER \
  --tensor-parallel-size TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE_PLACEHOLDER \
  --distributed-executor-backend mp \
  --gpu-memory-utilization GPU_MEMORY_UTILIZATION_PLACEHOLDER \
  --max-model-len MAX_MODEL_LEN_PLACEHOLDER \
  --max-num-batched-tokens MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS_PLACEHOLDER \
  --kv-transfer-config "$(cat /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/kv_config.json)" \
  > /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/consumer.log 2>&1 &

echo $! > /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/consumer.pid
echo "[INFO] Consumer started with PID: $(cat /home/REMOTE_USER_PLACEHOLDER/consumer.pid)"
SCRIPTEOF

tasks.name: Consumer: Verify setup
commands: ssh -i "${SSH_KEY}" "${REMOTE_USER}@${NODE2_PUBLIC_IP}" 'python3 -c "import nixl, os; d=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(nixl.__file__),\"_lib\"); print(f\"[OK] {len([f for f in os.listdir(d) if \\\"LIBFABRIC\\\" in f])} LIBFABRIC plugin(s)\")"'
